description: Ambiguous business questions where company-specific definitions change correct SQL. Controls verify plain questions stay untouched.

cases.question: What was net revenue in Q4 2024?
cases.why: Net revenue must subtract refunded returns; without context the model sums total_amount only.

cases.question: How many active customers do we have?
cases.why: Company defines active = purchased in Q4 2024; without context the model guesses.

cases.question: What was the return rate in Q4 2024?
cases.why: Return rate excludes rejected requests and needs both tables.

cases.question: How much money did we refund to customers in 2024?
cases.why: Only status='refunded' returns are paid out; summing all statuses overstates refunds.

cases.question: What is our average case resolution time?
cases.why: Resolution time = resolved_at - created_at over resolved cases only.

cases.question: How many open support cases are there?
cases.why: Company backlog definition includes in_progress, not just status='open'.

cases.question: Which region performed best in 2024?
cases.why: Region performance is ranked by net revenue; gross ranking can differ.

cases.question: How many repeat customers did we have in 2024?
cases.why: Repeat = 2+ transactions; needs GROUP BY customer HAVING count threshold.

cases.question: How many churned customers do we have?
cases.why: Churn = bought in H1 2024 but nothing on/after 2024-07-01.

cases.question: How many units did we sell in December 2024?
cases.why: Units = SUM(quantity), not transaction row count.

cases.question: What was total revenue in October 2024?
cases.why: Plain revenue question must behave identically with the layer on.

cases.question: What are the top 5 products by revenue?
cases.why: Plain ranking question must retrieve no business context.
